reference: Yes, you should see a doctor. It is most likely a hematoma on the bone, but an X-ray should be done to rule out any fracture. Ibuprofen tablets may be advisable three times a day after meals, along with hot fomentation and the application of Thrombophob gel, which your doctor may suggest if necessary. Best wishes.
text: Yes, you should see a doctor. It is most likely a hematoma on the bone, but an x-ray should be done to rule out any fracture. Iviprofen tablets may be advisable three times a day after weeks, along with clot fomentation and the application of throbopo gel. Your doctor may suggest if necessary. Best wishes.
